expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
Explains lazy allocation in terms of trap/page-fault handling or page-table invariants
expectations.evidence: Explains lazy allocation semantics, usertrap, uvmunmap, copyin/copyout, and page alignment.

expectations.text: Requests the exact panic/trap information and a reproducible trigger
expectations.evidence: Requests code snippets and panic info, but does not insist on an exact panic plus a clear minimal trigger as directly.
